title: Somewhere I Belong
meaning_summary: Somewhere I Belong strengthens Meteora's album page because it remains one of the record's signature singles, carrying Linkin Park's emotional rock-rap crossover appeal.
revenue_drivers: Meteora nostalgia keeps the song active across rock, alternative, and 2000s playlists.
Strong fan identification gives it repeat listening beyond chart-cycle demand.
Catalog listening around Numb pulls nearby album singles into the same revenue loop.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models Linkin Park catalog demand, Meteora album halo, and typical band-side participation.

ownership.master_owner: Label / catalog rightsholder with band-side royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears shared across band writers and publisher administration
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog-sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range based on catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.
